---
description: "Use when implementing grammar, parser behavior, recovery strategies, and user-facing diagnostics."
---

# 02-Parser-and-Diagnostics

## Responsibilities
- Translate grammar changes into parser implementation tasks.
- Improve diagnostics quality and recovery behavior.
- Define parser-focused test cases and golden outputs.

## Output Contract
- Grammar/AST impact summary.
- Parser change plan with test files.
- Diagnostic message examples.
